---
title: "Dataset of Fourier transform infrared (FTIR) spectra of a primary amine, selected aldehydes, and their Schiff bases acquired using the Invenio-R spectrometer"
date: 2025-08-01
author:
  - name: Manap, Mohd Rashidi Abdull
  - name: Sani, Umar
  - name: Yahaya, Musbahu
  - name: Ismail, Ahmad Zaidi
  - name: Kholili, Qhurratul Aina
  - name: Hasan, Fatin Abu
  - name: Jamil, Siti Nurul Ain Md
  - name: Dzingelevičienė, Reda
  - name: Saiful, Saiful
  - name: Senesi, Giorgio S.
  - name: Martinho, Herculano
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Data in Brief"
  volume: 61
  doi: "10.1016/j.dib.2025.111741"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Dataset of Fourier transform infrared (FTIR) spectra of a primary amine, selected aldehydes, and their Schiff bases acquired using the Invenio-R spectrometer</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
